title: ScimUser
description: A SCIM 2.0 User resource representing a Contentstack user account.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs for this resource.

id.description: SCIM-assigned unique identifier for the user.

userName.description: The user's email address used as the primary unique identifier.

emails.description: List of email addresses for the user.

primary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary email address.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active. Set to false to deprovision (deactivate) the user in Contentstack.
